# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Create AWS CloudFormation template for SQS queue and SNS topic setup. Define queue with message retention and visibility timeout. Set up SNS topic for pub/sub messaging. Configure queue policy to allow message operations. This is for our serverless event processing architecture.
# Category: sqs_policy_too_permissive

Resources:
  EventQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 86400 # 24 hours in seconds
      VisibilityTimeout: 30

  NotificationTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      TopicName: ServerlessEventProcessingTopic

  EventQueuePolicy:
    Type: AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy
    Properties:
      QueueArn:
        Ref: EventQueue
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal: "*"
            Action:
              - SQS:SendMessage
            Resource:
              !GetAtt EventQueue.Arn

Outputs:
  QueueURL:
    Description: URL of the Event Queue
    Value: !Ref EventQueue
  TopicArn:
    Description: ARN of the Notification Topic
    Value: !Ref NotificationTopic
